title: Zhe Zhai
text:
I am an Assistant Professor of Economics in the School of Business at the Macau University of Science and Technology. I received my Ph.D. in Economics from the Georgia Institute of Technology.
My research is in applied microeconomics — the economics of innovation and firm strategy, labor markets, and corporate finance, with recent work on corporate green innovation and new quality productive forces.
我是澳門科技大學商學院經濟學助理教授，博士畢業於美國佐治亞理工學院，研究方向為創新經濟學、企業戰略、勞動經濟學與公司金融。






📍 School of Business, Macau University of Science and Technology · ✉️ zzhai@must.edu.mo

text: Innovation · Firm strategy · Organizational behavior · Labor demand and supply · Corporate finance · Globalization · Environmental economics.

title: Research
text:
Publications


McCarthy, P., & Zhai, Z. (2019). Economic impact analysis of GDOT short line railroad infrastructure investment in Georgia. Research in Transportation Economics, 77, 100728.


Tian, X., Gong, J., & Zhai, Z. (2022a). Natural disasters and human capital accumulation: Evidence from the 1976 Tangshan earthquake. Economics of Education Review, 90, 102304.


Tian, X., Gong, J., & Zhai, Z. (2022b). The effect of job displacement on labor market outcomes: Evidence from the Chinese state-owned enterprise reform. China Economic Review, 72, 101743.


Zhai, Z., & Ghosal, V. (2022). Internationalization of innovation and firm performance in the pharmaceutical industry. International Review of Economics & Finance, 80, 882–905.


翟喆. (2009). 中国税制改革中的遗产税. 现代经济信息, (24), 98.


翟喆. (2010a). 再探“强生门”迷雾. 现代商业, (7), 276–277.


翟喆. (2010b). 宝钢收购新钢的併购方案籌劃及影響預測. 财会研究, (21), 60–62.

title: Research
text:
Grants

The Multidimensional Effects and Mechanism Analysis of Corporate Green Innovation on the Enhancement of New Quality Productive Forces. Faculty Research Grants, Macau University of Science and Technology. Principal Investigator, 2024–2025.
“Excellent Young Scholars” Program, Hunan Provincial Department of Education. Principal Investigator, 2024–2026.
Economic Impact Analysis of GDOT’s Short Line Railroads, Georgia Department of Transportation. Personnel, 2016–2018.

title: Research
text:

Referee: Journal of International Financial Markets, Institutions & Money; Journal of Political Economy Microeconomics; China Economic Review; Journal of Management Science and Engineering.
External reviewer: Department of Education, Central University of Finance and Economics.
Conference organizing committee, Xiangjiang Forum, 2022–2023.
Guest tutor, USPTO Patent and Trademark Resource Center at Georgia Institute of Technology, February 2015.

title: Welcome
text:
This is the home for short notes and longer pieces on my research and on economics more broadly — the economics of innovation, firm strategy, labor markets, and corporate finance.
New posts will appear here. To write one, I add a folder under posts/ with an index.qmd — or just tell Claude the idea and it drafts and publishes it.
